title: Transfer of Business Address. An LMA may transfer its business address
content: 10 upon submission of the following documents: 11 12 a. Letter of Intent to transfer office in the case of sole proprietorship, or a partnership 13 or Board Resolution or Secretary’s Certificate approving the transfer of office in 14 case of a corporation; 15 16 b. Original or Certified true copy of: the Certificate of Filing of Amended Articles of 17 Incorporation/Partnership; or the Amended General Information Sheet; or other 18 required SEC documentation reflecting the amended address; and 19 20 c. Copy of lease contract or proof of building ownership. 21 22 The Department shall acknowledge such transfer after inspection and an assessment of 23 compliance with space, office layout, and equipment requirements has been completed. 24 25 The LMA shall publish a notice to the public of the new business address in a newspaper 26 of general circulation within thirty (30) calendar days from such transfer. The proof of 27 publication shall be provided to the Department within five (5) calendar days from 28 publication. 29 30
